titleStmt.title: SII 28.38: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 38. (A.R. No. 38 of 1913.) KĀRGUḌI, NAMAKKAL TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kailāsanāthasvāmin Temple, maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, south wall.

p.hi: JaTAvarman Tribhuvanachchakravartti Vīra-pāṇḍya Year 22, Vṛiśchika śu. 5, Monday, Uttirāḍam 1318 A.D., October 30.
p.note: Cf. A.R.E. p., 1914, p. 60; Ibid, 1909, Part II, para 27.

summary.p: This records a resolution by the nāṭṭavar (adminstrative body in a nāḍu territorial division) of Karikāla-chōḻa-vaḷanāḍu on the northern bank (of the river Kāvērī ?) as communicated to the Ādi-chaṇḍēśvara-dēvār-kaṇmi and temple accountants of the temple of Śrī-Kayilāsaṁ-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, the uḍaiyār of Tirukkārīkuḍi alais Vikrama-chōḻapuram in the same nāḍu as mentioned above. The resolution pertained to the grant of the village Ūṟṟakkarai alias Aḻagiyakūttanallūr including all the land there in naṉ-chey, puṉ-chey, kāḍu, mēḍu, kaḷar and tiḍal as serva-namasyam and mudal-aḍaṅgā-iṟai-ili (tax free-inclusive of mudal) to the above stated temple, for the purpose of having the daily worship done for the food-offerings and decoration (śāttu-ppaḍi) during the festival in the month of Chittirai, conducted and for the carrying out of the periodical maintanance and repairs of the temple premises. The field measuring 200 kuḻi that has been allotted free of taxes for the upkeep of the kuḷumi (tank ?) constructed by Tirumāṇikkadēvan alias Chittiramēḻi-taṭṭāṉ, in the same village was excepted from the purview of the above grant. The record refers to the tanks of the village having been silted up and rendered useless which were now repaired, and the wet land fed by those tanks, the āyam collections, maravaḍai, āyavargam, pañjupīli, vikkiramāppāru, taṟi-iṟai, taṭṭār-pāṭṭam, (taṭṭoli ?), chekkirai, ērivari, inavari, iḍai- ••••• kuḷavaḍai, olukkunīr pāṭṭam, āṉai-śālai, kudiraippandi, ••• ṇikkai, kāttigai-ppachchai, nā[ṭṭu]-viniyōgam etc were made the entitlements of the temple. The intervention in this regard by Perumāḷ Kulaśēkharadēvar, various mudalis, uḍankūṭṭam and Vijayadēvar are also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koccaṭaiyaṉpaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇṭiya de
vaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2kku Irupattiraṇṭāvatu vṛścika nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyu
m tiṅkaṭkiḻamai peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ vaṭakarai karikālacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu nā
ṭṭavarom Iṉṉāṭṭut tirukkārikuṭiyāna vikramacoḻapurattu Uṭaiyār śrī keyilā
samuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśuradevakaṉmi koyiṟ kaṇakka
ṟku Iṉṉāṭṭu Ūṟkkaraiyāṉa Aḻakiya kūttanallūr nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa
naṉcey puṉcey kāṭu meṭu kaḷar tiṭar Uṭpaṭṭa nilattu Uḷḷūr nāyaṉārko
yiṟ Uṭaiyāṉ Iṟaiyili
Ivvūr tirumāṇikka tevanāṉa cittirameḻit taṭṭāṉ kuḻumikurutta Itukku Ivaṉ Iṟaiyili kuḻi
2 100m nīkki nīkkiyuḷḷa nilattu puṉceyum Ivvūr kuḷaṅkaḷ muṉṉāḷ veṭukaṭitta nāḷmutal
Iṉṉāḷ varaiyum Uṭaikuḷap pāḻaraiyaḻittu kiṭakkayil Itukkuḷ Aṭaittu
koṇṭu Ikkuḷaṅkaḷāluḷḷa naṉcey maravaṭai Āyavaṟkam pañcupili vikkiramappe
ṟu taṟiiṟai taṭṭārappāṭṭam taṭacekkiṟai Erivari Inavari Iṭaikuḷavaṭai Oḻukku
nīrpāṭṭam Āṉaicālai kutiraippanti kāṇikkaik kāttikaippaccai nāṭṭuviniyokam mu
ṟum Uḷpaṭṭa Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Iṉṉāyiṉār tirukkoyilile perumāḷ kulacekaradevar pala
mutalikaḷum Uṭaṉkūṭṭamum vicaiyadevarum vaḷainta Itukkum palakalakākum nāṭāka puku
ntu parikārappaṭukaiyāle Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku cittirait tirunāḷukku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikku nitta nimantaṅkaḷukku
m Ittirukkoyil tirumatiḷ Aḻivucorvum pala tiruppaṇikaḷukkum devatānamāka Inta Ūṟṟakkaraiyāṉa A
ḻakiya kūttanallūr sarvanamasyamum Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttu Ivvūr candrātityavat cellavum kallilum
cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu tattilum nāṉkellaiyilum Ālasthāpanam paṇṇikkoḷḷavum
Ippaṭikku Ivvūr mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār śrīkaiyilāsamuṭaiya nāyaṉār ko
yil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevarkaṉmi koyiṟ kaṇakkaṟku karikālacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu nāṭṭavarom Ippaṭikku
Ivai puttūruṭaiyāṉ kaṇṇuṭaiyapperumāḷāṉa nampuceyvāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai puttūruṭai
yāṉ tiruccirāppaḷḷi Uṭaiyānāṉ nampu ceyvāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pācciluṭaiyāṉ tirupIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 28.38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
